source.name: google-10000-english (US no-swears)
source.description: Frequency-ranked from Google's Trillion Word Corpus; upstream swear-filtered list.

filtering.exclusions: Upstream swear filter plus WORDSTRIKE names, brands, abbreviations, technical jargon, and niche terms.
filtering.tiering: 72% frequency-rank position and 28% typing complexity (length, uncommon letters, consonant clusters, repeated letters, morphology).
